welcome.subject: You're in! You'll get my daily Splash Plays 1 hour before tip
welcome.preheader: Welcome to Splash Play. Here's what to expect.
welcome.body:
Welcome {firstName}.

You just signed up for **{sportsUpper}** daily picks from Splash Play. Here's the deal:

- **1 hour before tip-off**, I'll email my top 5 projections plus the player that my 100,000 contest sims have with the highest win rate on across DK + FD.
- That's all you'll get from me besides the occasional site update or deal offer, no spam or other nonsense.
- Want the full customizable sims, MLB, NBA, and NFL data, and Stokastic exports? There's a lot more insights to be had. [See plans →]({joinUrl})

While you wait for the next slate, two things worth bookmarking:

→ [Watch my latest streams on YouTube]({ytUrl})
→ [Join the Discord, if you've got a YouTube or SplashPlayPodast.com membership]({discordInvite})

— Chris Spags @ Splash Play

nba.subjectTemplate: NBA locks in ~1hr. {topPlayer} leads the SPAGS Projections on SplashPlayPodcast.com
nba.intro: Here's your freebies for the day, your top five NBA players of the slate right before lock.
nba.outro:
Things may change, I always update once more right before lock. Don't miss out! https://splashplaypodcast.com/join

— Chris

flows.name: Lead: how the sim works
flows.subject: How the sim actually works
flows.body:
Quick behind-the-scenes look at what you get from SplashPlayPodcast.com.

The Splash Play Monte Carlo sim runs up to 100K contest simulations. For each one:

- Every player's score is pulled from a **Box-Muller normal distribution** around their projection, with position-specific volatility. You get my projections underpinning the sim by default BUT can edit them to fade the chalk or see how a boosted projection impacts your favorite player if you're a VIP member.
- A **game environment multiplier** (0.85-1.15) and **team bias** (0.95-1.05) shift correlated players together.
- A fully sized contest field is built via **iterative proportional fitting** to match projected ownership.
- The 5,000 top projected lineups along 1,500 strategic pivots get ranked vs this projected field with contest settings from REAL tournaments, payouts get applied, duplicate dilution gets factored in.

End result: a win-rate, cash-rate, and ROI you can actually trust with more sims behind them than any other product in the industry. Pair them with your hand build or another lineup builder or sims tool for maximum results! [See for yourself →]({joinUrl})

— Spags

flows.name: Lead: 4.3x ROI case study
flows.subject: How Splash Play members win more
flows.body:
A lot of what I built with SplashPlayPodcast.com was stuff I wanted to use myself to help make my efforts to build lineups and get in good bets (and best ball teams in offseason NFL) more easily and with more EV behind them.

What I've been surprised by most is what other people do to find success on a given slate.

The Projection Matrix is something I use for handbuilds or selecting a core of players because there's no easier way to see the data flattened out. Projections, sim win rates, minutes, and Fantasy Points Per Minute in one place. That's part of why I made it for Squirt Squad and VIP tier.

But the big one that guys use and get the best results with? The Sims tab. You still get the gist with Sim win rates on the Matchups and Matrix tabs but a lot of guys have used the 30+, 40+, 50+, and 60+ columns along with the 5x and 6x percentages to dial in lineups and identify low-owned players in ways I never thought possible.

With that plus people exporting my SPAGS projections to a Stokastic sim, there's been a lot of success for the community even on slates where I've gotten smoked. Which is humbling! But a sign things work.

[See the tools and data →]({joinUrl})

— Spags

flows.name: Lead: 20% off first week
flows.subject: 20% off your first week
flows.body:
Have you been meaning to pull the trigger? Here's a push.

Use code **WELCOME10** at checkout for 10% off your first week or month — Squirt Squad or VIP, your call. You can technically also get 10% off an annual sub if you really want to lock in and build together.

[Grab the deal now →]({joinUrl})

— Spags

flows.name: Lead: last check-in
flows.subject: Last check-in
flows.body:
I won't keep pestering.

If Splash Play isn't for you, just unsubscribe at the bottom — no hard feelings.

If you're on the fence, the sim + Discord combo is what most new members say made it worth it. [Here's the join page]({joinUrl}).

Either way — you'll still get the free daily slate emails 1hr before tip.

— Chris

flows.name: Onboarding: quickstart
flows.subject: Thanks for joining Splash Play - Here's what you need to know
flows.body:
You're in! Thanks for signing up and supporting Splash Play.

A few things to knock out in the next 10 minutes so you get value out of day 1:

- **Join the Discord** → Your membership grants you access to the Splash Play Discord. You can see the latest projection updates whenever I push data for any sport along with key info and banter with the community: https://splashplaypodcast.com/discord/
- **Bookmark your tool** → [NBA]({siteUrl}/nba) · [NFL]({siteUrl}/nfl) · [MLB]({siteUrl}/mlb)
- **Watch my latest streams** → [YouTube]({ytUrl})

Reply to this email if anything's confusing.

— Spags

flows.name: Onboarding: first sim
flows.subject: Run your first sim in 5 minutes
flows.body:
Quick one.

If you haven't run a sim yet, here's the fastest path:

1. Open [the NBA tool]({siteUrl}/nba).
2. Hit **Run Monte Carlo** (default 25K). You'll see win-rate, ROI, and cash-rate for every lineup.
3. Sort by win-rate and export your top 20 to DK.

Tomorrow I'll show you the late-swap trick most people miss.

— Chris

flows.name: Onboarding: late-swap
flows.subject: Late-swap is where the real edge lives
flows.body:
Most people lock lineups and walk away. That's the mistake.

Late-swap lets you re-sim after news drops — injuries, rotation shifts, Vegas line moves — and swap your remaining unlocked players into the new optimal.

[Open the late-swap tool →]({siteUrl}/nba)

It's built into every tier.

— Chris

flows.name: Onboarding: VIP features
flows.subject: VIP features you might be missing
flows.body:
You've been in a week. Quick reminder of what unlocks on VIP:

- **Monte Carlo sims** (up to 100K)
- **Stokastic export** — drop my projections into any Stokastic tool
- **SPAGS exports** — clean DK/FD CSVs, no manual cleanup
- **Late-swap** — re-sim with locked players

If the ROI math works for you, [upgrade to VIP →]({joinUrl}).

— Chris

flows.name: Winback: 50% off
flows.subject: 50% off your first month back
flows.body:
Saw you canceled. That's fine — but before you go:

If it was a money thing, I'll knock **50% off your first month back** with code **COMEBACK50**.

[One-click resubscribe →]({joinUrl})

If it was something else — reply and tell me what's missing. I read every one.

— Chris

flows.name: Winback: what's shipped
flows.subject: Here's what's shipped since you left
flows.body:
Two weeks of updates:

- Sim calibration tightened (~3% tighter on win-rate accuracy vs DK results)
- Late-swap UI redesign — faster, clearer locked-player display
- New: Stokastic ownership sync for MLB

If any of that sounds useful: [come back with COMEBACK50]({joinUrl}).

— Chris

flows.name: Winback: final offer
flows.subject: Final offer
flows.body:
Last email from me.

**COMEBACK50** is still good for 50% off your first month back. After this, it expires and I stop emailing.

[Come back →]({joinUrl})

— Chris
